MALTA FINANCIAL SERVICES AUTHORITY ACT
(PACKAGED RETAIL AND INSURANCE-BASED
INVESTMENT PRODUCTS (PRIIPS))

[ L.S.330.18

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 330.18
REGOLAMENTI DWAR MALTA FINANCIAL
SERVICES AUTHORITY ACT (PACKAGED RETAIL
AND INSURANCE-BASED INVESTMENT
PRODUCTS (PRIIPS))
17 ta’ Ġunju, 2022

L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 178 tal-2022.

Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
